old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-9frv","title":"router.c: GPSR distance calculation vulnerable to integer overflow","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/routing/router.c
Lines: 523-561

In distance_approx_m():

    int64_t dlat_m_100 = dlat_e7 * 111;  /* *100 of meters for precision */
    int64_t dlon_m_100 = dlon_e7 * 111;  /* needs cos(lat) correction */
    dlon_m_100 = (dlon_m_100 * 707) / 1000;

    uint64_t dist_sq_100 = (uint64_t)((dlat_m_100 * dlat_m_100) +
                                      (dlon_m_100 * dlon_m_100));

For maximum coordinate delta (e.g., lat from -90 to +90 degrees = 1.8e9 in e7):
- dlat_e7 = 1800000000
- dlat_m_100 = 1800000000 * 111 = 199,800,000,000 (fits in int64)
- dlat_m_100 * dlat_m_100 = ~3.99e22 which OVERFLOWS int64 (max ~9.2e18)

The cast to uint64_t happens AFTER the multiplication, so the overflow has already occurred in signed int64 arithmetic (undefined behavior in C).

Fix: Cast to uint64_t before squaring, or scale down earlier to prevent overflow.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:50:31.894278Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:50:31.894311Z"}

Lines: 523-561

    int64_t dlon_m_100 = dlon_e7 * 111;  /* needs cos(lat) correction */
    dlon_m_100 = (dlon_m_100 * 707) / 1000;

    uint64_t dist_sq_100 = (uint64_t)((dlat_m_100 * dlat_m_100) +
                                      (dlon_m_100 * dlon_m_100));

For maximum coordinate delta (e.g., lat from -90 to +90 degrees = 1.8e9 in e7):
- dlat_e7 = 1800000000
- dlat_m_100 = 1800000000 * 111 = 199,800,000,000 (fits in int64)
- dlat_m_100 * dlat_m_100 = ~3.99e22 which OVERFLOWS int64 (max ~9.2e18)

The cast to uint64_t happens AFTER the multiplication, so the overflow has already occurred in signed int64 arithmetic (undefined behavior in C).

Fix: Cast to uint64_t before squaring, or scale down earlier to prevent overflow.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:50:31.894278Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:13:32.086220656Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:13:32.086220656Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:18:32.086220656Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:13:32.086220656Z"}
new_value: {"notes":"Commit: f8d259667\nScaled to e4 + pre-square abs cast to uint64_t already in distance_approx_m() (with SECURITY comments). Prevents signed overflow UB for full earth deltas. Matches test vectors and GPSR usage. P2 fixed completely."}
Overflow prevented via e4 scaling + uint64 cast-before-square; commit f8d259667
